baseline.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, repo snapshot rebuilds with cold code-intel path
baseline.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs forcing repo/project caches and CodeGraphContext CLI health to reset before each buildRepoSnapshot(project) call

result.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, repo snapshot rebuilds with warmed code-intel snapshot
result.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs rebuilding repo snapshots after code-intel was primed once, while clearing repo/git/static/code-graph caches before each build

environment.note: The current host still has a broken cgc launcher on PATH; this proof measures code-intel reuse on top of the repaired broken-CLI handling.
